creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
After I updated to r14, the problem is still there.
By the way, there're some other problems:
1. There's a leading <feff> at the start of
work/mysql-gui-tools-5.0r14/common/library/base-library/source/myx_database_model.c,
which makes it not compile.
2. When starting mysql-query-brower, it said that
(mysql-query-browser-bin:34715): libglade-WARNING **: could not find
glade file '/usr/local//usr/local/share/mysql-gui/common/preferences.glade'
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'MGGladeXML::Error'
Abort trap
After I changed /usr/local/bin/mysql-query-browser and changed DIRNAME
to "" it started successfully.
But the problem is still there.
